title: prefetch

source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Mon, 12 Jan 2026 18:11:26 GMT

raw_columns.Description: The prefetch link relation type is used to identify a resource that might be required by the next navigation from the link context, and that the user agent ought to fetch, such that the user agent can deliver a faster response once the resource is requested in the future.
